header: How we work, in three steps

items.content: Discover. We start with a short workshop to map your goals, users, and constraints. You leave with a clear scope and a fixed timeline before a single line of code is written.
Design & build. Working in weekly sprints, we ship reviewable increments you can test with real users. Nothing is hidden until launch day, so feedback shapes the product as it grows.
Launch & support. We handle deployment, accessibility checks, and handover docs. After go-live you get 30 days of priority support to settle any rough edges.
